scripts.deploy:preview: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name hsb-boden --branch preview --commit-dirty=true
scripts.deploy:production: echo 'BLOCKED: Production deploys run only via .github/workflows/deploy-production.yml (workflow_dispatch, approval-gated).' && exit 1
scripts.deploy:dry-run: npm run build && wrangler pages functions build functions --outdir node_modules/.cache/functions-check && wrangler pages deployment list --project-name hsb-boden
